goal.summary: 将 process-manager 升级为显式 workspace、幂等收敛、可中断恢复、资源有界、三平台统一的本地控制器，使调用方能确定 manager 状态并通过 session lease 安全清理本轮进程树

requirements.summary: 所有公共命令使用显式绝对 workspace 或 config，禁止 CWD 静默选择 runtime
建立纯读 closed manager state resolver，区分 absent、pending、stale、unresponsive、security、environment 与 corrupt
pm_manager ensure 在持久 operation lock 和 receipt 下幂等收敛到 ready
manager stop 和 restart 成为可恢复 phase operation，精确停止 owned runs、清 bootstrap 且不恢复旧 service
manager loss 和 restart 先验证 native owner empty，再提交 terminal 或移除 active
新增 session open、renew、status、close、lease expiry 与 finalizer，start 必须声明 session 或 persistent

active run、open/heavy session、pending prune、control request、history age/count 和 retained total reservation 都有 closed cap，日志与 metadata 容量预留、automatic GC、compact tombstone、可恢复 prune journal 与 mutation admission 持续生效
Windows 和 POSIX runtime security verify-first，准确区分 insecure、denied、unverifiable 和外层环境且无默认提权
public contract current-only 原子迁移，删除重复 health、shutdown 和泛化 manager_offline
Planner、Executor、Electron verifier 使用 ensure、session 和 finally close，finite command 直接运行
unit、eval、static、native、三平台、delegated cgroup、review 与 final cleanup 形成完成门
保留三平台自动选择、whole-tree owner、loopback token、secret redaction、无 arbitrary PID、no shell 和 no auto restore
status 和 doctor 提供平台中立 state、action、resource summary，doctor 提供受限 native diagnostics

acceptance_criteria.summary: 不同 CWD 向同一 absolute workspace 或 config 调用时解析为同一 runtime，缺失、相对、冲突或 mismatch 返回 context_invalid 且不写文件
status 对全部 closed manager states 返回唯一 state、证据摘要和建议动作，且 filesystem、ACL、identity 和 bootstrap 均不 mutation
已初始化 workspace 中两个调用者并发 ensure 时只产生一个 operation 和 manager instance并最终 ready，未初始化 workspace 返回 init action 且不隐式创建 config
ensure 或 stop 进行中时 status 公开 checkpoint、deadline 和 retryAfter，未超期 pending 不被误判 offline 或 stale

restart 对 healthy 或 exact-unresponsive manager 完成 cleanup 和新 instance ready且不恢复 service，身份不确定不 kill，存在其它 ownership 时无显式 destructive confirmation 不执行，确认后的 work generation 变化则 fail precondition；generation 匹配时先事务化安装 intake fence，再停止已确认 work

stop 对 absent 和重复调用幂等，healthy 或 exact-unresponsive manager 都通过同一 stop phase 收敛到 absent；live ownership 未显式确认时不执行，确认后的 work generation 变化则 fail precondition；shutdown handler 只 ack 并在 response 后交给单一 coordinator，identity 不确定时不执行 destructive action，任一 owner、session、handler/thread、identity 或 bootstrap 未清时不虚假成功
manager crash 后持久 active record 先保持 terminating，owner cleanup 和 verify 后才 terminal，无法验证时保持 cleanup pending
关闭一个 session 只清理该 session runs，不影响其他 session、persistent run 或无关进程

live session 只在 current manager instance 内、monotonic/wall deadline 前显式续租；clock anomaly 或 manager instance 变化使旧 session 失效且不能 renew/start，expiry、close 或 restart 中断后继续同一 finalizer并在 owner empty 后 closed，idle shutdown 与新 work 通过 persisted work generation/intake fence 原子互斥
start 未提供 session 且未显式 persistent 时失败，service restart 继承原 ownership
history 超 age、count 或 bytes 时只事务化清理 eligible terminal run且 active/terminating 不删除，closed session 压缩为 compact tombstone，prune/cleanup evidence 可恢复且 central tombstone 有界保留

active/session/journal/control-request count 或 projected total reservation 达限时执行对应有界收敛并拒绝超额 mutation；total reservation 合并 fixed actual、closed metadata capacity、manager/active/candidate rotation capacity，status 报 usedBytes、reservedBytes、limitBytes、overBudget 和 cleanupPending且控制线程不越界；饱和只接受 domain-separated、current-instance、短时有效的 HMAC-SHA256 busy evidence，建议 wait 且不得自动 restart
Windows 等价 inherited ACL 被接受，broad allow 或 rights 不足判 insecure，descriptor denied 判 permission denied，证据不足判 unverifiable，status 不改 ACL
PM error 与外层 shell 或 profile access denied 分层，doctor 不硬写 supervisor ready，无 JSON envelope 时不归因 ACL、不删 runtime、不自动提权
public happy path 只使用 ensure、session 和 manager stop，health、shutdown、status-start、泛化 manager_offline current refs 消失且三个 consumers 同步通过
三平台 start、stop、crash、restart、session expiry 保持 whole owned tree cleanup、unrelated process survive、backend 不泄漏、no arbitrary PID、no shell 和 no auto restore
当前 commit 的 Windows、Ubuntu、macOS matrix 与 Ubuntu delegated cgroup job 全部通过并上传匹配 commit 和 attempt 的 machine evidence
final review、cleanup 和 audit 后 required receipt passed，无 active、terminating、cleanup pending、manager、bootstrap 或 task tmp residue且 diff allowlist 合法

manager 启动内容由 bounded runtime fingerprint 固定；只有 operation expected、identity、authenticated health 与当前受控源码全部一致才 ready，源码漂移归 non-retryable stale/restart，摘要不可验证归 environment_unverifiable 且不触发 ACL 或任意 kill

nonfunctional_requirements.summary: 普通 public schema、commands 和 state 在 Windows、Linux、macOS 一致，平台选择只在内部与 doctor audit 暴露
不按任意 PID 或全机枚举 cleanup，不自动恢复 service，不引入 restart loop
当前用户、loopback、token、secret redaction、path 和 symlink 边界保持，普通使用不要求管理员
manager operation、session close、start admission 在并发和中断下线性化且幂等
active count、history count 和 age、retained bytes、日志和所有 wait 或 poll 具有硬上限
error message 精确、code closed、retryable 只用于已证 transient，doctor diagnostics 脱敏
state 和 filesystem cleanup 使用 atomic commit、quarantine、rollback 或 finalizer，owner 未空不丢证据
status 和 sweeper 使用有界精确索引，不做全 workspace 或全机扫描，endpoint probe 使用短 timeout
继续使用 Python 3.12 标准库与现有 native API，不新增、升级或替换第三方依赖
current-only 原子迁移，无旧 runtime schema、legacy script、compatibility parser 或双 public contract

stages.title: 确定性上下文、状态解析与 Ensure
forbidden_changes: service, session, resource or consumer public migration
status mutation of runtime, ACL, identity or bootstrap
CWD fallback, second manager truth source or third-party dependency
entry_conditions: revision 2 implementation 已获用户批准并写入 attestation
当前 Process Manager unit baseline 可重现
context、closed state、operation receipt 与 error taxonomy 已冻结
exit_conditions: different CWD same workspace identity 与 invalid-context no-write 通过
closed resolver state table 与 status pure-read 通过
concurrent ensure 单 operation 单 instance，未初始化 context 不隐式创建 config且无 residue
stage code-review 无 blocking 或 major finding

stages.title: Manager Convergence 与 Runtime Security Foundation
forbidden_changes: arbitrary PID, process-name or whole-machine cleanup
service auto restore, restart loop, public platform switch or system daemon
terminal commit or active removal before owner empty
session or consumer public migration; resource behavior change beyond no-op module extraction
SDDL string equality, regex or error text as ACL truth
automatic elevation or status-time remediation
legacy identity or operation parser, weak runtime fingerprint or fingerprint mismatch as kill authority
entry_conditions: STG-01 resolver、ensure 与 operation receipt 已通过并审查
exact manager identity、owner capability、bootstrap evidence 与 runtime fingerprint closed schema/预算已固定
现有三平台 owner contract baseline 可重现
runtime security verify/remediate taxonomy 与 500 行生产模块预算已冻结
identity/operation schema 切换前可证明 manager、owned runs、bootstrap 和 pending operation 全空；未知旧 schema 按 stop condition 阻塞且不实现兼容 parser
exit_conditions: stop 和 restart 对 healthy、exact-unresponsive、runtime-stale、重复调用及 phase interruption 可恢复，shutdown ack 后只有单一 coordinator且 identity 不确定或 live ownership 未确认时不执行 destructive action
manager crash 后 persisted run 只在 owner empty 后 terminal
restart 不恢复 service、其它 ownership 无确认不停止且 unrelated process 存活
Windows ACL equivalence、insecure、denied、unverifiable 与 no-mutation 分类通过
operation expected、child startup capture、manager identity、authenticated health 与当前 source fingerprint 只有全等才 ready，drift、manifest race/escape/overflow 与 identity-health mismatch 均 fail closed
manager state/start/finalization/resource/fingerprint extraction 形成低耦合模块且生产 Python 文件不超过 500 行
stage code-review 无 blocking 或 major finding

stages.title: Session Lease、Ownership 与 Finalizer
forbidden_changes: default persistent or start without declared ownership
second session cleanup engine instead of the owner finalizer
session closed before every owned run owner empty
secret or platform capability stored in session holder
entry_conditions: STG-02 owner-first finalizer、persisted reconciliation 与 restart 已通过
session schema、manager-instance binding、monotonic/wall TTL、transitions 和 index 已冻结
default validation TTL 1800 seconds 与 persistent opt-in 已确认
exit_conditions: 多 session、persistent 与 unrelated process 隔离通过
normal close 和 expiry 只在 owner empty 后 cleanup verified
manager restart、clock forward/backward 不延长或恢复旧 session
start ownership 必填、service restart 保持 ownership且 idle-stop race 保留新 work
stage code-review 无 blocking 或 major finding

stages.title: Resource Governance
forbidden_changes: automatic deletion of active or terminating runs
unbounded scan, logs, wait or poll
runtime security contract regression or duplicate ACL engine
new public busy state, unsigned, mismatched, expired or replayed busy trust, or busy-triggered automatic restart
entry_conditions: STG-03 ownership 与 finalizer 已稳定
resource defaults、actual/total reservation formula、metadata cap、manager/service log rotation capacity、quarantine 和 tombstone transaction 已冻结
STG-02 runtime security foundation 与 no-op resource extraction 已通过
exit_conditions: active/history/session/journal/request count、age、metadata、manager/service log generations、actual/total reserved bytes 与 cleanup pending 边界通过
GC 不选择 active 或 terminating且中断可由 bounded pendingPrunes 恢复，closed session 可安全压缩
resource status/doctor summary 复用既有 security evidence且不建立第二 ACL engine

domain-separated、current-instance 且未过期的 signed busy 在 public unresponsive 下只产生 bounded wait；unsigned、mismatch、expired 或 replay fail closed且不触发 auto-restart，shutdown response 后唯一 coordinator 排空 tracked control resources 后才成功
stage code-review 无 blocking 或 major finding

stages.title: Public Contract、消费者、Eval 与 CI 原子迁移
forbidden_changes: legacy health or shutdown wrapper, old schema parser or status-start fallback
consumer copy of manager state machine, internal runtime reads or ACL guesses
unrelated Skill behavior, Reviewer contract or repository-wide formatting
CI secrets, remote mutation, elevation or ordinary branch filter
entry_conditions: STG-01 through STG-04 internal contract 全部通过
旧 public scripts、references、eval 和 consumer call sites inventory 完整
current-only deletion 与 migration 可在单 stage 原子完成
exit_conditions: 仓库 current scope 无旧 health、shutdown、status-start、generic offline 或 ownership-less start
Process Manager 与三个 consumer unit、eval、static 全部通过
docs、help、examples 与 closed public schema 一致
stage code-review 无 blocking 或 major finding

stages.title: 三平台验证、最终审查与资源清场
allowed_changes: all files approved by STG-01 through STG-05 and ART-04 for directly evidenced fixes
task-local execution, validation, review and observation artifacts
minimal fixes required by final review within approved scope
forbidden_changes: production change without failing required validation evidence
new scope, dependency, compatibility layer or public platform interface
unauthorized external write, push or elevation
claiming hosted success without current commit evidence
deleting failure evidence or user processes to fake cleanup
entry_conditions: STG-05 current-only contract 与 consumers 已完成并审查
本地 required commands 可重建且工作树位于 allowlist
用户推送当前 commit 后才读取 hosted evidence
exit_conditions: VAL-01 through VAL-18 required evidence 当前且通过
三平台和 delegated evidence 绑定最终 commit 和 attempt
final receipt passed 且无 blocking 或 major finding
无 active、terminating、cleanup pending、manager、bootstrap 或 task tmp residue
diff allowlist、stale reference 和 diff check 通过

validations.command: python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_cli_contract.py && python -u -X utf8 -B evals/process-manager/run_static_checks.py --output .harness/tasks/2026-07-17/feature/process-manager-control-plane-convergence/artifacts/validation/structure-syntax.json
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_*.py
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_manager_lifecycle.py
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_sessions.py
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_resources.py
python -u -X utf8 -B -m unittest discover -s skills/process-manager/tests -p test_runtime_security.py
每个 STG 完成后使用 complex-coding-reviewer code-review 对 stage target、context 和 validation claims 生成正式 receipt，无 blocking 或 major finding方可完成阶段
用户推送最终 candidate 后运行 .github/workflows/process-manager-platforms.yml 的 Windows、Ubuntu、macOS matrix，并导入匹配 commit SHA、run ID 和 attempt 的 artifacts
用户推送最终 candidate 后运行 Ubuntu scoped systemd-run delegated cgroup job，并导入匹配 commit SHA、run ID 和 attempt 的 populated、kill、owner-empty 与 unit cleanup evidence
使用 complex-coding-reviewer code-review 和 final-integration scope 对最终代码、docs、tests、eval、CI 与当前 validation evidence 生成并校验正式 receipt
关闭 task sessions 和 owned runs，必要时停止 idle manager，验证 owner、bootstrap、runtime tmp 全空；扫描旧 public refs 和 changed-path allowlist；运行 git -c diff.autoRefreshIndex=false diff --check

reapproval_triggers: manager state set、operation/session schema、owner-empty 终态语义或 current-only public contract 发生实质变化
Stage DAG、required validation、allowed/forbidden scope、默认资源上限或 consumer migration 范围发生变化
需要第三方依赖、系统服务、数据库、平台公开接口、兼容层、auto service restore、外部写入或提权
需要修改 ART-04 之外的其它 Skill 公共行为，或无法在一个 stage 原子迁移三个 consumers
三平台证据证明选定 owner/security 方案不可行，需要改变平台架构而非最小修复
active task pointer 冲突、用户改动或 baseline 漂移使当前计划不能安全执行
stop_conditions: 用户尚未批准 implementation、请求暂停或撤销授权
任一 reapproval trigger 发生
owner、runtime、identity 或 context 无法安全验证，继续操作可能误杀或删除用户资源
required validation、blocking 或 major finding、blocking verification gap 在有界修复后仍未关闭
需要未授权 dependency、external write、push、elevation 或长期进程
active task pointer 属于另一非终态任务
无法生成真实、当前、目标绑定的 hosted、review 或 cleanup evidence
